channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Melania Trump: ‘We are dealing with much more danger’
item.description: Former first lady Melania Trump weighed in on the state of former President Donald Trump's bid for the White House in an interview Wednesday, while also reflecting on the recent assassination attempts on her husband's life.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Trump credits an immigration chart for saving his life and what the graphic is missing
item.description: Ever since the assassination attempt at his rally in Pennsylvania, Donald Trump has professed a unique fondness for a bar chart he credits for saving his life. Trump was addressing the crowd in Butler about illegal immigration and reviewing a chart that detailed U.S.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Top 6 major moments from the Valadao, Salas debate
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGPE) - For those who might have missed it, here are the top six notable questions and answers from Wednesday's debate between David Valadao and Rudy Salas. Both candidates are competing to represent the Central Valley in California's 22nd Congressional District.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Haunted by 2016, some Michigan Democrats worry that Harris remains ill-defined in swing state
item.description: EASTPOINTE, Mich. (AP) — Bill Clinton stood with Michigan Democratic Rep. Debbie Dingell outside a suburban Detroit grocery store two days before the 2016 election when it was clear to both that Hillary Clinton would lose the state.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and JOEY CAPPELLETTI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal judge blocks California law banning election deepfakes
item.description: A federal judge on Wednesday blocked a California bill that bans AI-generated "deepfake" content and required the removal of "deceptive content" from social media.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump calls Jack Smith filing 'pure election interference'
item.description: The former president spoke exclusively to NewsNation about the unsealing of documents related to his election interference case.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Are Nevada voters swayed by promises of 'no tax on tips'?
item.description: Reporter John Langeler from KLAS in Las Vegas joins "The Hill" to discuss whether Nevada voters are swayed by proposals to eliminate federal taxes on tips.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Watch: FOX59/CBS4 Indiana Governor Debate
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- For the first time this election year, the two major party candidates are having the opportunity to participate in a televised debate surrounding issues that are important for Indiana voters. U.S. Senator Mike Braun, R-Ind.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, NewsNation

item.title: Ranked choice voting is on the ballot in several states
item.description: Ranked choice voting could be coming to states like Colorado, Nevada and Oregon. Here's what to know.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Here are some important election deadlines for the Las Vegas valley
item.description: LAS VEGAS (KLAS) -- Nevada voters have until Oct. 22 to register to vote should they want a mail-in ballot, and remember, in-person registration is available on Election Day.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Judge unseals new Trump Jan. 6 election interference evidence
item.description: Prosecutors provided the most detailed look yet at their election interference case against former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson and Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Full Debate: Kaine, Cao audition to represent Virginia in US Senate
item.description: The first was Wednesday's meeting between Virginia Democratic Sen. Tim Kaine and Republican challenger Hung Cao on Norfolk-based WAVY-TV.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans lead September voter registration charge in Nevada
item.description: Nonpartisan voters were just ahead of Republicans registering to vote in Nevada during September. Democrats lagged in third.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: WATCH: 22nd Congressional District Debate with David Valadao and Rudy Salas
item.description: The two candidates seeking election to California's 22nd Congressional District will face off tonight.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, NewsNation

item.title: DHS warns of risks around Oct. 7, November election in annual threat assessment
item.description: “We are, of course, aware that that anniversary may add even more fuel to an already challenging and heightened threat environment,” a DHS official said.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from the Vance-Walz VP debate
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance (R) and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) met face-to-face in New York City on Tuesday in the first and likely only vice presidential debate of the election cycle, a high-stakes moment that comes a little more than a month before Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: State of Democra-Z: Takeaways from the vice presidential debate
item.description: The vice presidential debate is not expected to push many voters to one side or another, but it offered a closer look at the men who could be second in command. We check in with two Gen-Z voters about what stood out to them.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Alanna Elder, MPR News

item.title: What we gleaned from key moments of the Walz-Vance debate in New York
item.description: MPR News senior politics reporter Dana Ferguson is in New York with takeaways from the only debate between the vice presidential hopefuls.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer, Dana Ferguson, and Aleesa Kuznetsov, MPR News

item.title: NY race for US Senate: Gillibrand talks Adams indictment, term limits, economy
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Incumbent New York Senator Kirsten Gillibrand joined PIX11 News Tuesday night to discuss her priorities in the race, including securing abortion rights and enforcing term limits for Supreme Court justices. Come Nov.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Why Tuesday's vice presidential debate could matter more than history suggests
item.description: Tim Walz and JD Vance might have the chance to reshape the political landscape Tuesday in their first and only debate.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Should moderators fact-check? Veteran broadcast debate host, journalism professor weigh in
item.description: MPR News host emeritus Gary Eichten and University of Minnesota associate professor and director of the Minnesota Journalism Center Benjamin Toff joined Morning Edition host Cathy Wurzer to talk about the positives and perils of live political debates.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Photos: As Jimmy Carter celebrates his 100th birthday, a look through the decades
item.description: Former President Jimmy Carter is turning 100. Here are images from notable events or parts of his life, both during his presidency and after.
item.dc:creator: James Doubek, MPR News

item.title: Israel begins ground offensive in Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military pressed its ground incursion into southern Lebanon on Tuesday, calling the operations “limited incursions” that are targeting Hezbollah militants.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin, Kat Lonsdorf, and Miguel Macias, MPR News

item.title: New NY poll shows Gillibrand leading, Hochul approval sagging
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- New York Democrat Kirsten Gillibrand has a 17-point lead as she seeks her third full term in the U.S. Senate, an exclusive poll from PIX11, The Hill and Emerson College shows. But it was not great news for all Democrats -- especially Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Harris and Trump change their campaign plans after Hurricane Helene's destruction
item.description: Hurricane Helene is scrambling the presidential candidates' plans this week. Democratic nominee Kamala Harris is cutting short a campaign visit to Las Vegas to return to Washington for briefings. Republican candidate Donald Trump is heading to Georgia to see the storm's impact.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, JILL COLVIN and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Biden administration expands asylum restrictions at southern border
item.description: The Biden administration announced Monday it will expand its asylum restrictions at the U.S.-Mexico border, cementing tougher standards that will cut off access to protections for many migrants.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about the Walz-Vance debate
item.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz (D) and Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) are set to go head-to-head on Tuesday night in their first and likely only debate as vice presidential contenders.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, Fox 5

item.title: Trump suspect pleads not guilty in attempted assassination
item.description: The man accused of attempting to assassinate former President Trump at one of his Florida golf courses earlier this month has pleaded not guilty to five federal charges, according to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers fear 'chaos' if Trump-Harris race goes to the wire
item.description: Lawmakers in both parties are bracing themselves for a messy aftermath to Election Day as polls show the race between former President Trump and Vice President Harris is so close in several battleground states that it could take days to determine the winner.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Exploring the Eric Adams indictment for bribery, wire fraud, and solicitating contributions from Turkish nationals
item.description: New York City Mayor Eric Adams pleaded not guilty in a federal bribery case after being indicted on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: VIDEO: Donald Trump tosses chicken tenders into crowd at college football game
item.description: Former President Donald Trump surprised college students on Saturday in Alabama with an unusual gift for football fans.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here are the rules for the Vance-Walz CBS debate
item.description: The debate, which will kick off at 9 p.m. EDT on Tuesday from the network’s New York office, will be moderated by CBS anchor Norah O’Donnell and "Face the Nation" host Margaret Brennan.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5
